message:
fix(messaging/subject): gate test module behind test-internals feature and add lab-runtime subscription tests

The tests module in subject.rs is now gated on
#[cfg(all(test, feature = "test-internals"))] and uses asupersync::
paths via the extern crate self alias added in the prior commit. This
prevents the test harness from being compiled in normal test builds
(it depends on internal APIs that change frequently).

Three new tests:
- sublist_resubscribe_after_drop_matches_again_with_new_id: verifies
  that dropping a subscription and re-subscribing to the same pattern
  produces a fresh subscription ID and resumes matching
- sublist_lab_runtime_schedule_is_deterministic: uses LabRuntime to
  verify that a writer+reader pair produces deterministic scheduling
  across runs with the same seed
- sublist_lab_runtime_cancelled_task_drops_subscription: verifies that
  cancelling a task that holds a subscription properly cleans up the
  subscription from the SubList

messaging_fabric_progressive_disclosure_contract.rs: removes the inline
#[path] re-include of subject.rs now that the module is feature-gated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
